eligible_rows.status_evidence: 147173e17ea741687247 SAMRIDH SAMRIDH SCHEME Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) MeitY Startup Hub (MSH), Digital India Corporation MeitY Startup Hub (MSH) CURRENT_SCHEME_INFORMATION_AVAILABLE APPLICATION_STATUS_REQUIRES_VERIFICATION Support existing and upcoming accelerators to select and accelerate promising product-based and IT-based startups, helping them scale through customer connections, investor connections, product enhancement and international-market access. About the program XR Startup Program is a collaboration between Meta and MeitY Startup Hub (MSH). The program aims to accelerate India’s contribution towards building the foundations of the metaverse and nurturing the development of Extended Reality (XR) technologies in India. The metaverse is the next generation of the internet. It will be a set of digital spaces, including 3D experiences that are all interconnected so people can easily move between them and will let people do things they could not do in the physical world.
